title: citrus × aurantium subf. glaberrima
intro: Citrus × aurantium subf. glaberrima, also known as bitter orange, is a plant species that belongs to the Rutaceae family and is a hybrid of citrus plants. It is used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve nausea, and reduce fever. The health benefits of bitter orange include its potential to aid in weight loss, improve mood, and boost energy levels due to its high concentration of flavonoids and limonoids. Bitter orange is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and essential oils, and is commonly found in traditional Chinese medicine and Ayurvedic practices.
